title: A Resolution authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños (MGLB) through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Neil Andrew N. Nocon to enter into a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with the Los Baños Senior High School represented by its school Principal Mr. Menandro A. Zubieto and Work Immersion Program Focal Person Ms. Evangeline S. Austria for the Work Immersion Program (WIP) of the Academic Institution's Senior High School students registered under the Academic Year 2025-2026.
